app.title: VN Toolkit
app.subtitle: Productivity tools for office workers
app.madeBy: Made with ♥ by Trần Chấn Hưng

home.heroSub: 22+ free tools — salary calculator, bill splitter, tax lookup, image compressor and more. Runs in your browser, no signup needed.

word-counter.name: Word Counter
word-counter.desc: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs and reading time

case-converter.name: Case Converter
case-converter.desc: Convert to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case

lorem-generator.name: Text Generator (AI)
lorem-generator.desc: Generate text with AI or Lorem Ipsum — emails, reports, announcements

image-compressor.name: Image Compressor
image-compressor.desc: Compress images to reduce file size for email, chat, faster uploads

qr-generator.name: QR Generator
qr-generator.desc: Create QR codes from links, text, WiFi. Download as PNG/SVG

salary-calculator.name: VN Salary Calculator
salary-calculator.desc: Calculate NET from GROSS salary, deducting social insurance & personal income tax (Vietnam)

loan-calculator.name: Loan Calculator
loan-calculator.desc: Calculate monthly payments, total interest for home & car loans

currency-converter.name: Currency Converter
currency-converter.desc: Convert VND, USD, EUR, JPY and other currencies with live rates

split-bill.name: Bill Splitter
split-bill.desc: Split restaurant bills, add tips, calculate each person's share

mst-lookup.name: Tax Code Lookup
mst-lookup.desc: Look up Vietnamese business information by tax code (MST)

bank-info.name: VN Bank Lookup
bank-info.desc: 50+ Vietnamese banks — SWIFT codes, BIN numbers, abbreviations

bmi-calculator.name: BMI Calculator
bmi-calculator.desc: Calculate BMI from height & weight, classified by WHO Asia standards

age-calculator.name: Age Calculator
age-calculator.desc: Calculate exact age, days between dates, next birthday countdown

unit-converter.name: Unit Converter
unit-converter.desc: Convert cm↔inch, kg↔lbs, °C↔°F, km↔miles and common units

pomodoro.name: Pomodoro Timer
pomodoro.desc: Focus timer using the Pomodoro technique — 25/5 minute cycles

sticky-notes.name: Sticky Notes
sticky-notes.desc: Colorful sticky notes saved right in your browser

random-picker.name: Random Picker
random-picker.desc: Spin the wheel, draw names — team building, pick who buys bubble tea

temp-mail.name: Temp Mail
temp-mail.desc: Create temporary email, receive verification emails — no signup needed

email-signature.name: Email Signature
email-signature.desc: Create professional email signatures for Gmail, Outlook — with logo & social links

qr-scanner.name: QR Scanner
qr-scanner.desc: Upload an image with a QR code to decode its content

lunar-calendar.name: Lunar Calendar
lunar-calendar.desc: Convert between solar & lunar dates, view auspicious days

common.dragDrop: Drag & drop files here or click to select
